Describe the main activity and the arrangement of the skateboarders on the road.
canonical_answer: A group of people are skateboarding down a paved road lined with green trees. A person wearing a bright yellow helmet and black shirt rides on the right side of the group. Another person wears a white helmet and light blue shirt near the center. Cars drive in adjacent lanes alongside the skateboarders. White dashed lines separate the road lanes.

question: Did the video show BOTH a person in an orange safety vest standing on the side of the road AND skaters holding hands while riding? A. only the person in the orange safety vest was seen B. only the skaters holding hands were seen C. both the person in the orange safety vest and skaters holding hands were seen D. neither the person in the orange safety vest nor skaters holding hands were seen

Describe the sequence of major actions and interactions among the skateboarders and surrounding traffic throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, people skateboard down a paved road with white dashed lines; at 2s, a person in an orange safety vest appears standing on the side; at 6s, cars including a white taxi begin driving in the adjacent lane; at 14s, skateboarders start holding hands while riding down the street; at 18s, a person in a blue shirt stands on the left side.

question: Has the young girl riding a bicycle with training wheels appeared in the scene yet?

What vehicle does the person wearing the yellow helmet use in the next segment?
canonical_answer: The person wearing the yellow helmet is riding a bicycle alongside a child.
